title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Reliance Retail

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Reliance Retail
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail:
Reliance Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
